name: GDN-Hybrid + Sliding Window Attention + Warmdown1000 + Int6 GPTQ
blurb: SP1024 GDN-Hybrid fixed-predictor run with Sliding Window Attention, warmdown=1000, and int6 GPTQ. Three-seed mean val_bpb 1.01671233 across seeds 42/1337/2024, with all counted artifacts under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
author: Joshua Martinez
architecture: SP1024 GDN-Hybrid ([GDN×5] -> SWA -> [GDN×5] -> SWA_shared), MuonEq-R + AdamW, EMA 0.997, warmdown=1000, int6 GPTQ + zstd-22, self-contained record packaging.
